name: posthog-js-rrweb-plugin-console-record
description: Subpath entry point exposing the @posthog/rrweb-plugin-console-record fork bundled inside posthog-js. Not published independently — lives inside the posthog-js tarball so consumers can `import 'posthog-js/rrweb-plugin-console-record'`. ESM-only: `module` and `main` both point at the ES bundle because every realistic consumer is a bundler (esbuild, webpack, vite, rollup) that picks `module` over `main`. Pure-Node `require()` is unsupported.
